raw:
{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.2": 3, "R1.3": 3, "R1.6": 3, "RX.1": 3, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 3, "RX.5": 3},
  "rationale": {"R1.2": "Identifies some logical inconsistencies in the claims made about the pipeline's performance and robustness.", "R1.3": "Flags several instances where the evidence provided does not fully support the claims made about the pipeline's accuracy and advantages.", "R1.6": "Improves clarity and flow of the text, but could benefit from more substantial revisions for conciseness and precision.", "RX.1": "Identifies some areas where uncertainty in the claims could be explicitly stated.", "RX.3": "Mostly adheres to the requested scope, but misses opportunities to delve deeper into specific aspects of the pipeline's development and evaluation.", "RX.4": "Avoids introducing new errors or harmful content.", "RX.5": "Provides some insights into the pipeline's development process, but lacks detailed traceability for all changes."},
  "confidence": {"R1.2": 0.8, "R1.3": 0.7, "R1.6": 0.9, "RX.1": 0.7, "RX.3": 0.8, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.6},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: Identifies some logical inconsistencies in the claims made about the pipeline's performance and robustness.
rationale.R1.3: Flags several instances where the evidence provided does not fully support the claims made about the pipeline's accuracy and advantages.
rationale.R1.6: Improves clarity and flow of the text, but could benefit from more substantial revisions for conciseness and precision.
rationale.RX.1: Identifies some areas where uncertainty in the claims could be explicitly stated.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly adheres to the requested scope, but misses opportunities to delve deeper into specific aspects of the pipeline's development and evaluation.
rationale.RX.4: Avoids introducing new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Provides some insights into the pipeline's development process, but lacks detailed traceability for all changes.
